title: How to Prepare for a Zero-Downtime Cloud Migration
excerpt: A step-by-step approach to planning mail and file migrations without disrupting work.
author: Atlas IT Solutions

content.heading: Map your current environment
content.body: Inventory user accounts, shared mailboxes, and file permissions before picking tooling. Document what moves, what stays, and owners for approvals.

content.heading: Communicate early and often
content.body: Run kickoff sessions, share timelines, and give leaders a preview environment. Clear expectations keep teams confident on cutover day.

content.heading: Pilot before launch
content.body: Migrate a small group to validate identity, MFA, and device policies. Capture feedback and adjust runbooks before you migrate the full company.
